root: ^Valentine barely had time to remove her coat that someone was already ringing at the door
^There a couple was standing, probably the meeting that Valerie was supposed to have
^Valerie is busy today so I hope you don't mind me taking his place, please come inside
^Valentine led them in the bedroom and slowly removing her shirt, sat on the bed
^From what I understand you've looking for couple toys, why don't I let you sample some of the ones we sells?
^As the couple both removed their clothes, Valentine did signed to come closer
^The woman sat on the bed as Valentine passed a hand around her back, as the man removed his underwear, revealing his throbbing manhood
^You reached the end of this jam game, you'll now be redirected to the main menu
